message:
feat(search): add SearchMetrics for V3 telemetry and operational visibility (br-2tnl.8.2)

Implements comprehensive Search V3 metrics collection for safe rollout:

- SearchMetrics struct with lock-free atomic counters and histograms:
  - Query volume: total/v3/legacy/shadow comparisons/errors
  - Latency histograms: all queries, V3, legacy (microseconds)
  - Shadow mode: equivalent/divergent/v3_errors, avg latency delta
  - Degradation: fallback count, semantic/rerank killswitch hits
  - Index health: Tantivy size, doc count, last update timestamp

- SearchMetricsSnapshot for serializable point-in-time snapshots
- 7 unit tests covering recording, shadow comparison, fallback, index health
- Integrated into GlobalMetrics alongside http/tools/db/storage/system

This provides the operational visibility required for safe V3 cutover
and maintenance per the Search V3 rollout track.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
